Microsoft OneDrive
Keep your files, photos, and videos automatically backed up and available on all your devices.
Sign in
Create a free account

Overview
Overview
Download the app
Explore OneDrive
Plans & pricing
Resources
Microsoft 365 apps
FAQ
Next steps
See plans & pricing
Sign in
See plans & pricing
Sign in
Overview
Securely save and share what's important
Back up and protect
Access from anywhere
Rediscover and share
Copilot in OneDrive
Previous
Next
For your desktop
Back up your important files, photos, apps, and settings so they're available no matter what happens to your device.
Learn more
For your phone
Automatically back up photos and videos on your phone with OneDrive cloud storage. Personal Vault keeps your most important mobile files behind identity verification. Ransomware detection monitors your account for suspicious activity, and end-to-end encryption protects your data wherever you access it.
Learn more
For your Xbox
Back up Xbox game captures to OneDrive cloud storage to keep your best moments protected, shareable, and accessible across devices. Personal Vault secures your most valued content, while ransomware detection safeguards your game library from threats. End-to-end encryption ensures your captures stay private.
Learn more
Access and edit your files from anywhere
Changes you make to your files are updated across all your devices and are even accessible offline.
Digitize your life
With the mobile app, scan important documents and meaningful mementos to keep them protected in the cloud.
Learn more
Easily find and relive moments
Enjoy your favorite memories with curated photo and video collections stored to your OneDrive from years past.
Learn more
Now included in Microsoft 365
Supercharge your Microsoft 365 experience with AI. Copilot is included with a Microsoft 365 Personal or Family subscription, giving you powerful AI in your favorite apps, including OneDrive.
Learn more
Summarize in an instant
Save precious time with Copilot by creating a summary before you even open the file.
Try in OneDrive
Get quick answers
Ask Copilot questions about a file to get the information you need without opening it.
Try in OneDrive
Quickly compare files
With Copilot, easily compare multiple files, freeing up time for what really matters.
Try in OneDrive
Back to tabs
Download the app
OneDrive for all your devices
For desktop
Automatically back up your computer’s folders and files with OneDrive.
Learn how
For iOS
Automatically save your phone’s photos and videos with OneDrive for iOS.
Learn how
For Android™
Automatically save your phone’s photos and videos with OneDrive for Android™.
Learn how
Explore OneDrive
Your files and photos, safe and accessible
Securely save, share, and access your files and photos wherever you are. OneDrive cloud storage includes Personal Vault for identity-verified protection, ransomware detection with file recovery, and end-to-end encryption to keep your data private.
OneDrive mobile app
Plans & pricing
OneDrive is better with Microsoft 365
For individuals
For business
Previous
Next
Yearly
Monthly
Microsoft 365
Free
For 1 person
5 GB of cloud storage
15 GB of mailbox storage
More information

Works on Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android™
OneDrive photo and file backup across your devices
Outlook.com email and calendar
Web and mobile versions of Word, Excel, PowerPoint, OneNote, OneDrive, and other apps
Microsoft 365 Basic
$19.99
/year
Subscription automatically renews unless canceled in Microsoft account.
See terms
.
Buy now
For 1 person
Use on multiple devices at the same time
Works on web, iOS, and Android
100 GB of secure cloud storage
OneDrive ransomware protection for your photos and files
Ad-free secure Outlook web and mobile email and calendar
Ongoing support for help when you need it
Outlook: Manage your email, calendar, tasks, and contacts together in one place.
OneDrive: Save, access, edit, and share files and photos wherever you are.
Microsoft 365 Personal
$99.99
/year
Subscription automatically renews unless canceled in Microsoft account.
See terms
.
Buy now
Try for free
For 1 person
Use on up to five devices simultaneously ​
Works on PC, Mac, iPhone, iPad, and Android phones and tablets
1 TB (1000 GB) of secure cloud storage
Word, Excel,
Learn more about Excel in Microsoft 365 Personal
Copilot in Excel requires AutoSave to be enabled, meaning the file must be saved to OneDrive; it doesn't function with unsaved files.
PowerPoint, Outlook,
Learn more about Outlook in Microsoft 365 Personal
Copilot features in Outlook apply to accounts with @outlook.com, @hotmail.com, @live.com, or @msn.com email addresses and are available in Outlook.com, Outlook built into Windows, Outlook on Mac, and iOS and Android apps.
and OneNote desktop apps with Microsoft Copilot
Learn more about Microsoft Copilot in Microsoft 365 Personal
AI features only available to subscription owner and cannot be shared; usage limits apply.
Higher usage limits than free for select Copilot features
Learn more about Copilot features in Microsoft 365 Personal
AI features only available to subscription owner and cannot be shared; usage limits apply.
Higher usage for AI image creation in Copilot
More information
AI features only available to subscription owner and cannot be shared; usage limits apply.
Microsoft Defender advanced security for your identity, personal data, and devices
Learn more about Microsoft Defender advanced security in Microsoft 365 Personal
Identity theft monitoring is only available in the United States and US territories.
OneDrive ransomware protection for your photos and files
Microsoft Teams with calls up to 30 hours and meetings up to 300 people
Ongoing support for help when you need it
Microsoft Copilot: ​Reimagine what’s possible with your everyday AI companion.
Word: Create impressive documents and improve your writing with built-in intelligent features.
Excel: Simplify complex data and create easy-to-read spreadsheets.
PowerPoint: Easily create polished presentations that stand out.
Outlook: Manage your email, calendar, tasks, and contacts together in one place.
OneNote: Meet all your notetaking needs with one cross-functional notebook.
OneDrive: Save, access, edit, and share files and photos wherever you are.
Microsoft Defender: Get threat prevention and detection with Microsoft Defender security capabilities.
Microsoft Teams: Bring everyone together in one place to meet, chat, call, and collaborate.
Microsoft 365 Family
$129.99
/year

hits.title: Dropbox, Google Drive and Microsoft OneDrive blocked in Turkey following leaks
Microsoft OneDrive for Business modifies files as it syncs
Everyone hates OneDrive, Microsofts cloud app that steals and deletes files
Microsoft pulls OneDrive update that would quiz you before letting you quit
Microsoft OneDrive Has 60% Jump in Hosting of Malicious Files
EU companies issue formal complaint against Microsoft OneDrive integration
Microsoft OneDrive cuts free storage by two thirds
Microsoft OneDrive is experiencing intermittent issues affecting all users

analysis.name: Microsoft OneDrive
analysis.tagline: Keep your files, photos, and videos automatically backed up and available on all your devices.
analysis.value_proposition: Cross-device cloud storage and backup integrated with Microsoft 365 apps and Copilot AI.
analysis.ideal_customer: Microsoft 365 users needing cloud file storage, backup, and sharing across Windows, Mac, and mobile devices

features.name: cloud file storage
features.description: Save files and access them from any device
features.evidence_quote: Keep your files, photos, and videos automatically backed up and available on all your devices.

features.name: automatic photo backup
features.description: Auto-save phone photos and videos to the cloud
features.evidence_quote: Automatically back up photos and videos on your phone with OneDrive cloud storage

features.name: pc folder backup
features.description: Back up Windows desktop, documents, and pictures folders
features.evidence_quote: Automatically back up your computer's folders and files with OneDrive

features.name: personal vault
features.description: Identity-verified protected area for sensitive files
features.evidence_quote: Personal Vault keeps your most important mobile files behind identity verification

features.name: ransomware detection
features.evidence_quote: Ransomware detection monitors your account for suspicious activity

features.name: end-to-end encryption
features.evidence_quote: end-to-end encryption protects your data wherever you access it

features.name: file sharing
features.description: Share files and folders with others
features.evidence_quote: Securely save, share, and access your files and photos wherever you are

features.name: offline access
features.description: Access files without an internet connection
features.evidence_quote: even accessible offline

features.name: cross-device sync
features.evidence_quote: Changes you make to your files are updated across all your devices

features.name: document scanning
features.description: Mobile app scans documents into cloud
features.evidence_quote: scan important documents and meaningful mementos to keep them protected in the cloud

features.name: photo memories
features.description: Curated photo and video collections from past years
features.evidence_quote: Enjoy your favorite memories with curated photo and video collections stored to your OneDrive

features.name: xbox game capture backup
features.description: Back up Xbox game captures to cloud
features.evidence_quote: Back up Xbox game captures to OneDrive cloud storage

features.name: copilot summarize
features.evidence_quote: Save precious time with Copilot by creating a summary before you even open the file

features.name: copilot file q&a
features.description: Ask Copilot questions about a file
features.evidence_quote: Ask Copilot questions about a file to get the information you need without opening it

features.name: copilot file comparison
features.evidence_quote: With Copilot, easily compare multiple files

features.name: web app
features.evidence_quote: Web and mobile versions of Word, Excel, PowerPoint, OneNote, OneDrive

features.name: ios app
features.evidence_quote: Automatically save your phone's photos and videos with OneDrive for iOS

features.name: android app
features.evidence_quote: Automatically save your phone's photos and videos with OneDrive for Android

features.name: desktop app
features.evidence_quote: Works on Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android

features.name: outlook integration
features.evidence_quote: Outlook.com email and calendar

features.name: word integration
features.evidence_quote: Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook and OneNote desktop apps

features.name: excel integration
features.evidence_quote: Copilot in Excel requires AutoSave to be enabled, meaning the file must be saved to OneDrive

features.name: powerpoint integration
features.evidence_quote: Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook and OneNote desktop apps

features.name: onenote integration
features.evidence_quote: OneNote desktop apps with Microsoft Copilot

features.name: microsoft teams integration
features.description: Teams with Copilot for chat and collab
features.evidence_quote: Microsoft Teams with Copilot to call, chat, and collaborate

features.name: microsoft defender
features.description: Advanced security for identity and devices
features.evidence_quote: Microsoft Defender advanced security for your identity, personal data, and devices

features.name: identity theft monitoring
features.evidence_quote: Identity theft monitoring is only available in the United States and US territories

features.name: ad-free email
features.description: Outlook without ads on paid plans
features.evidence_quote: Ad-free secure Outlook web and mobile email and calendar

features.name: advanced email security
features.evidence_quote: Advanced email security features

features.name: ai image creation
features.description: Copilot image generation with higher limits
features.evidence_quote: Higher usage for AI image creation in Copilot

features.name: family sharing
features.description: Share plan with up to 6 people
features.evidence_quote: For 1 to 6 people (AI features for subscription owner only)

features.name: multi-device concurrent use
features.evidence_quote: Use on up to 5 devices simultaneously

features.name: onedrive api
features.evidence_quote: Get started with OneDrive API

features.name: sharepoint integration
features.evidence_quote: SharePoint and OneDrive in Microsoft 365

features.name: sensitivity labels
features.evidence_quote: Enable sensitivity labels for files in SharePoint and OneDrive

features.name: admin sync policies
features.description: IT admin controls for sync behavior
features.evidence_quote: IT Admins - Use OneDrive policies to control sync settings

features.name: hybrid deployment
features.evidence_quote: Hybrid deployments

features.name: file recovery
features.description: Recover files after ransomware or deletion
features.evidence_quote: ransomware detection with file recovery

differentiators: Deep Copilot AI integration across Office apps
Native Windows integration and PC folder backup

recent_ships.what: Copilot integration in OneDrive for file summarization, Q&A, and comparison
recent_ships.source: landing page - 'Now included in Microsoft 365 - Supercharge your Microsoft 365 experience with AI'

praised: Integration with Windows and Office apps
complaints: 'Everyone hates OneDrive, Microsofts cloud app that steals and deletes files'
'Microsoft OneDrive for Business modifies files as it syncs'
'Microsoft pulls OneDrive update that would quiz you before letting you quit'
'Microsoft OneDrive cuts free storage by two thirds'
'60% Jump in Hosting of Malicious Files'
EU antitrust complaints about forced Microsoft integration
Service outages ('experiencing intermittent issues affecting all users')

free_tier.limits: 5 GB cloud storage, 15 GB mailbox storage, 1 person

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5 GB cloud storage, 15 GB mailbox, web/mobile Office apps

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: 100 GB storage, ad-free Outlook, ransomware protection ($19.99/yr)

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Personal
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1 TB storage, Office desktop apps, Copilot, Defender ($99.99/yr)

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Family
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 6 TB (1 TB/person), 6 users, Office + Copilot ($129.99/yr)

pricing.notes: Consumer plans priced per subscription (1-6 users), not seat-based. Business/enterprise plans on separate page. Copilot AI features restricted to subscription owner only, not shareable across family plan.
